prompt: Edit image 1: Apply a warm, soft focus bokeh lighting effect to the background, inspired by the atmospheric light in image 2. Introduce subtle, soft-focus floral elements into the foreground grass, similar to the blurred flowers seen in image 3, maintaining a photorealistic photography style.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1: Apply a warm, soft-focus bokeh lighting effect to the distant hills and sky in the background, drawing inspiration from the golden, atmospheric light and prominent circular bokeh in image 2. Introduce subtle, soft-focus floral elements into the lower foreground grass, resembling the delicate, blurred white daisies depicted in image 3. Maintain a consistent photorealistic photography style throughout the edited image.
objects: Warm, soft-focus bokeh lighting effect in the background
Golden atmospheric light in the background
Prominent circular bokeh in the background
Subtle, soft-focus floral elements in the lower foreground
Blurred white daisies in the lower foreground
